name: Propanc Biopharma, Inc.
summary: PART I General As used in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, references to the Company, Propanc, we, our, and us refer to Propanc Biopharma, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiary, unless otherwise indicated. In addition, references to our financial statements are to our consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this Annual Report on Form 10-K except as the context otherwise requires.
